steps.title: Define supporting evidence
steps.content: The team claims migrating whales may not live only on stored energy. Evidence that whales feed while migrating would show that they can gain energy during the trip.

steps.title: Reject indirect findings
steps.content: Choice A mentions other animals feeding nearby. Choice C compares counts of observations in different directions. Choice D discusses timing of migration. The remaining finding directly observes the whales feeding on the way to breeding grounds. The answer is B.
